name: Classroom Teaching Staff
description: Educators responsible for planning and delivering lessons.
typical_members: Class teachers, subject specialists, SEN teachers

name: Senior Leadership Team (SLT)
description: Strategic oversight and school-wide decision makers.

name: Administrative Services Staff
description: Handles day-to-day operations, communications, and clerical tasks.

name: Operational Support Staff
description: Staff who provide essential logistical and technical support.
typical_members: Site managers, IT technicians, catering, cleaning staff

name: Classroom Support Staff
description: Direct classroom assistants supporting teaching and pupil progress.
typical_members: Teaching Assistants, Learning Support Assistants, SEN Support

name: Student Teaching Staff
description: Staff undergoing training placements, often supervised by mentors.

name: Pastoral Care Team
description: Oversees student well-being, behaviour, and safeguarding.

name: Inclusion & SEND Team
description: Manages special educational needs and inclusion initiatives.

name: Extracurricular Coordinators
description: Facilitates after-school programs, clubs, and enrichment activities.
typical_members: Sports coaches, music instructors, club leads

name: Governance & Compliance
description: Ensures regulatory alignment, inspections, and policy frameworks.

name: Early Years Foundation Staff
description: Staff dedicated to nursery and reception-level education.
